title: Bunions
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: A bunion is a bony bump near the base of the big toe.
Bunions can cause pain, redness, and shoe irritation.
Supportive care can include wider shoes, padding, and clinician-directed pain control.
Infection, diabetic foot risk, neurovascular compromise, trauma, or severe inability to walk require separate care.
